import io
import string
import list

fn parse_tokens(_ line: String) -> List<Int>
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut token = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(line)
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
        if not string.is_empty(token)
          match string.parse_int(token)
          when Some(v)
            nums = list.push(nums, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          token = ""
        end
      else
        token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(token)
    match string.parse_int(token)
    when Some(v)
      nums = list.push(nums, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  nums
end

fn find_and_print(_ nums: List<Int>, _ t: Int) -> Unit
  let n = nums.len()
  mut i = 0
  mut found = false
  while i < n and not found
    mut j = i + 1
    while j < n and not found
      match nums.get(i)
      when Some(a)
        match nums.get(j)
        when Some(b)
          if a + b == t
            print("found=#{i},#{j}")
            found = true
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not found
    print("none")
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    let nums = parse_tokens(line)
    match io.read_line()
    when Some(tline)
      match string.parse_int(string.trim(tline))
      when Some(t)
        find_and_print(nums, t)
      when None
        print("none")
      end
    when None
      print("none")
    end
  when None
    print("none")
  end
end
